title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Possess Me, Satan**
*2026*
Use your role's ability to find the ghost and exorcise them.
![Possess Me, Satan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_d6cb36b1.jpg)

2. **Moon Colony Bloodbath**
*2025*
Whatever can go wrong will go wrong. Players compete to keep their colonists alive.
![Moon Colony Bloodbath](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_a5c4d313.jpg)

3. **Morty Sorty Magic Shop**
*2026*
Apprentices try to demonstrate their talent for stocking the shelves.
![Morty Sorty Magic Shop](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_bc8a788e.jpg)

4. **Rebirth**
*2024*
Rebuild old lands in a lush, hopeful future.
![Rebirth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_5149c2fe.png)

5. **First Giants**
*2026*
Dinosaurs, flying reptiles & giant mammals — create the most prestigious exhibition!
![First Giants](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_f201e11b.png)

6. **The Queen's Dilemma**
*2026*
Leaders join in council to vote on the kingdom’s issues, but with hidden motives!
![The Queen's Dilemma](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_54739705.jpg)

7. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_4131c325.png)

8. **Lands of Evershade**
*2026*
 Hybrid RPG/board game combines storytelling, tactical combat, and dice-based system.
![Lands of Evershade](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_3025e19d.png)

9. **World Order**
*2026*
Simulate the modern global political system in this area-control game.
![World Order](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_05db9812.jpg)

10. **Elysium**
*2015*
Create mighty combinations, write epic legends, and earn the favour of the Gods.
![Elysium](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_f96e78e6.png)

11. **Let's Go! To France**
*2026*
Create a travel itinerary and go on your dream vacation to France.
![Let's Go! To France](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_f371c0d4.jpg)

12. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_61d32c4d.jpg)

13. **Boss Fighters QR**
*2025*
Team up and use your wits and gear to crack the tactics of intelligent boss monsters.
![Boss Fighters QR](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_b80eaaa1.jpg)

14. **Toy Battle**
*2025*
Send forth an army of toys to conquer territories.
![Toy Battle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_cbaae592.jpg)

15. **The Legacy of Mars**
*2027*
Discover new planets to terraform, and new ways to do it!
![The Legacy of Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_461da58c.jpg)

16. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_a9ddc469.jpg)

17. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_1abc4e89.jpg)

18. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_743e9bdb.jpg)

19. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_5a4048b9.jpg)

20. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_86f6390c.jpg)

21. **Terraforming Mars**
*2016*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_b4d72aec.jpg)

22. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_50116af9.jpg)

23. **Shards of Creation**
*2026*
Harness the primal forces of Brandon Sanderson's Cosmere.
![Shards of Creation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_2f2f5466.jpg)

24. **Arcs**
*2024*
Rule the galaxy with your court, fleet, and cities.
![Arcs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_fa2289d9.png)

25. **Root**
*2018*
Decide the fate of the woodland as asymmetric factions fight for contrasting goals.
![Root](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_9d3f65c3.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*16 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_0fd412b7.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*24 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_2183963b.jpg)

3. **Ark Nova**
*52 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_f4bb9c1c.jpg)

4. **Castle Combo**
*19 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_4a87d62b.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*88 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_8a84d078.jpg)

6. **Bomb Busters**
*12 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_320902bb.png)

7. **Azul**
*102 months on the list*
Artfully embellish the walls of your palace by drafting the most beautiful tiles.
![Azul](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_6f929d6f.png)

8. **Terraforming Mars**
*115 months on the list*
Compete with rival CEOs to make Mars habitable and build your corporate empire.
![Terraforming Mars](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_55428ba2.jpg)

9. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*41 months on the list*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_b8b4f21d.jpg)

10. **Sea Salt & Paper**
*34 months on the list*
A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_718ff252.jpg)

11. **Forest Shuffle**
*31 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_564456a7.jpg)

12. **Cascadia**
*57 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_6acabaf5.jpg)

13. **Hot Streak**
*3 months on the list*
Which mascot will cross the finish line first? Who will be DQ'd?
![Hot Streak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_15d33fcf.jpg)

14. **Faraway**
*24 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_9cd493bc.png)

15. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*17 months on the list*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_d3e280c2.jpg)

16. **Sky Team**
*31 months on the list*
Work together silently to land a plane under increasingly challenging circumstances.
![Sky Team](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_b80b820d.jpg)

17. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*64 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_de3bed56.jpg)

18. **The Gang**
*10 months on the list*
Bet together the order of your hands in Texas Hold'em Poker to win together.
![The Gang](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_80537ed2.jpg)

19. **Brass: Birmingham**
*17 months on the list*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_f9065936.jpg)

20. **The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game**
*10 months on the list*
Travel from the Shire and overcome every obstacle as a team.
![The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring – Trick-Taking Game](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_ca23f31a.jpg)

21. **Magical Athlete**
*3 months on the list*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_145336b4.png)

22. **Carcassonne**
*274 months on the list*
Shape the medieval French landscape, claiming cities, monasteries, roads, and farms.
![Carcassonne](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_3609ef9e.jpg)

23. **The White Castle**
*30 months on the list*
Become the most influential clan in Japan's Himeji stronghold.
![The White Castle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_ffedc13c.jpg)

24. **SCOUT**
*41 months on the list*
Poach your opponents' artists and outdo each other's circus shows.
![SCOUT](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_a719c9c7.png)

25. **Splendor**
*144 months on the list*
Renaissance merchants race to grab gems, acquire property, and please nobility.
![Splendor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-05-24/toplist/bgg_a6ae89de.jpg)
author: boardgamegeek.com
